# Awaireness

> See the invisible cost of AI

## What this is
Awaireness is a privacy-first web app that calculates the environmental footprint of your AI usage — water consumption, energy use, and CO₂ emissions — without storing any of your data.

## How it works
1. Users provide AI usage data via file import (ChatGPT/Anthropic exports) or API key (one-time read, never stored)
2. The app calculates water (liters), energy (kWh), and CO₂ (grams) using published research on data center resource consumption
3. Results are displayed with real-world comparisons (e.g., "equivalent to X glasses of water")
4. All computation happens in-browser. No data is persisted, transmitted, or logged.

## Privacy model
- Zero data persistence: no cookies, no localStorage, no databases
- API keys are used once in-memory and discarded
- No analytics, tracking pixels, or third-party scripts
- File imports are parsed client-side and never uploaded

## Key metrics calculated
- **Water**: Liters of cooling water consumed by data centers per prompt/token
- **Energy**: Kilowatt-hours of electricity used for inference
- **CO₂**: Grams of carbon dioxide equivalent emissions

## Methodology
Calculations are based on peer-reviewed research including data center PUE (Power Usage Effectiveness), WUE (Water Usage Effectiveness), and regional grid carbon intensity factors. All estimates are conservative and sourced from published literature.

## Technical details
- Framework: Vite + React 18 (TypeScript)
- Hosting: Vercel
- Domain: https://awaireness.app
- License: Open source
